title: pelargonium × stapletonii
intro: Pelargonium × stapletonii, also known as the Stapleton's rose geranium, is a hybrid species of flowering plant that belongs to the Geraniaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where its leaves and flowers are used to make teas, infusions, and other herbal preparations. The health benefits of Pelargonium × stapletonii include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help alleviate digestive issues, reduce stress, and promote a good night's sleep. The plant's leaves can be used to make herbal teas, infused oils, and other preparations that can be consumed orally or applied topically to the skin.
